name: Studio18 Indoor Golf & Games
about: Studio18 Indoor Golf & Games is a multi-faceted venue in Wolfeboro, NH, featuring three indoor golf simulators, an interactive kids' gaming wall, and a bar with local drinks. The facility offers a range of experiences including individual golf simulator rentals, winter leagues, and event hosting for birthdays and corporate outings. With 1,000+ virtual courses available and a casual, family-friendly atmosphere, the venue caters to golfers of all skill levels alongside non-golfing family members and friends. Pricing is structured on a per-bay-hour basis with an early bird special on weekdays, and the facility is open seven days a week with hours subject to change.
why_golfers_like_it: Free club rentals available for all golfers
Winter leagues with weekly prizes and new courses
Private bay option for more intimate sessions
Casual atmosphere suitable for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed; venue encourages bringing own cake and snacks for parties
Full bar with biggest selection of local drinks available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, free club rentals are included with your bay rental at Studio18.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue allows BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) and encourages bringing cake and snacks for parties.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required for 18 holes depends on the number of players and simulator pace, but most sessions last approximately 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is Studio18 kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue features an interactive kids' gaming wall with 100+ games and offers party packages specifically designed for children.
